definitions.translation: to propel oneself forward with ski poles

examples.no: skiløperen staket seg opp på pallplass
examples.en: the skier poled his way up onto the podium

definitions.text: stavre eller stolpre seg fram med stokk
definitions.translation: to hobble or shuffle forward with a stick
to walk stiffly, heavily, and slowly

examples.no: det var så vidt han staket seg over golvet
examples.en: he could barely drag himself across the floor
